weeks.intro: Foundation week. The first job is not to chase the stack. It is to set the seats and pins where they belong, learn how each movement should feel, find your Zone 2 on a machine, and arrive at week two unbroken. Easy days stay easy.

days.title: Strength A · Push + Squat
days.note: Learn the machines and set the seats. Leave 2-3 reps in reserve on every set. Target RPE 6. Sub goblet squats for the leg press to train the free-standing pattern any time.

A.rawText: Warmup: 5 min easy cardio, joint circles, band pull-aparts

B.rawText: Warmup: 5 min easy cardio, joint circles, band pull-aparts

days.title: Zone 2 Cardio
days.note: Block 1 has no interval days. Every cardio session this week is Zone 2.

A.rawText: 35 min Zone 2 on a treadmill, bike, or elliptical
Conversational pace; nasal breathing the whole session
Trust the talk test over the machine's heart-rate readout

B.rawText: 40 min Zone 2 on a machine, or easy jog
Nasal breathing if able; talk test otherwise
If you cannot speak in full sentences, slow down

days.title: Strength B · Pull + Hinge
